item.title: Crown Letter: Freedman
item.description:
Crown Letter: Dr. Marc Freedman

The Family Table â€” Bridge Builder

January 24, 2026

Dear Dr. Freedman,

What if every family had a village?

Not a metaphorical village. A real one â€” with people across generations who show up for each other. Grandparents who aren’t isolated. Young families who aren’t overwhelmed. Wisdom flowing in one direction, energy flowing in the other.

You’ve spent your career proving this isn’t nostalgia. It’s infrastructure. CoGenerate exists because you understand that separating generations doesn’t just hurt older adults â€” it impoverishes everyone.
